title: Kaworu and Rei
wikitext:
[]: Kaworu and Rei             Quote Post by aranami » Wed Aug 11, 2004 9:06 pm If Kaworu , the vessal of Adam's soul, is an Angel, why is Rei, the vessal of Lilith's soul, not? _______________________ Man fears the darkness, and so he scrapes away at the edges of it with fire.

[]:             Quote Post by Invincible Kaji » Wed Aug 11, 2004 9:36 pm Kaworu was born of Adam. All beings born of Adam are Angels. Rei was born of Lilith. All beings born of Lilith are Lillim. Therefore, Rei is Lillim.

[]:             Quote Post by kosure » Wed Aug 11, 2004 9:52 pm I think Rei is kind of both. Her body/soul combo isn't like anything anyone else has. So I think its hard to classify her. Shes not entierly Lillim, beacuse she could combine with lillith. A regular human couldn't do that.

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Wed Aug 11, 2004 10:01 pm She is an angel, it's as simple as that. It seems I've gone over this at least 4 times.
